title: Connect review and navigation surfaces to proposal context
summary: Expose proposal context directly inside native review queue and navigation audit surfaces so matching proposal work is visible before opening the full artifact section.
acceptance_criteria: Review queue cards surface matching proposal context for components and views.
Navigation map cards or detail audit surfaces surface matching proposal context for the selected view.
The change reuses existing proposal artifact matching logic instead of introducing a second proposal state model.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Review queue cards now show proposal count, ready count, and preview-ready count badges for matching component and view scopes.
Navigation map cards now show matching proposal badges, and the navigation trigger audit grid now includes proposal count and preview readiness truth for the selected view.
Validated the ticket schema after marking the slice solved.
Confirmed there are no whitespace or patch formatting issues in the slice.
Repo contract still passes after the review and navigation proposal-context slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 re-rank after HS-0020: review queue and navigation audit still hide proposal context behind deeper artifact sections.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Prefer lightweight badges and summary chips over adding a second proposal detail workflow.
Keep root checkout clean after lane claim and release.
